summary: We reviewed your Spring 2026 Brighton balances for Malia and Jett and reallocated payments so each child shows an equal share of what your family still owes.
Malia (Tycoons | Brighton) and Jett (Macaronis | Brighton) each now show about $329.16 remaining on their $900.00 enrollments ($658.31 total). Winter Greece enrollments remain paid in full.
We cleared failed autopay installment rows that were blocking the Payments page and reset your next payment so you can use Pay Now from Upcoming Payments.
Your 2026 membership remains paid in full ($175.00). Sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com → Payments to pay the remaining balance. Reply to this email if anything still looks wrong.
